title: సిలువలో నా ప్రభువా
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: But he was wounded for our transgressions, he was bruised for our iniquities
God forbid that I should glory, save in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ

story: A deeply moving Passion hymn from the Telugu Christian tradition, sung especially during Good Friday services and the Lenten season. This keerthanamu meditates on the suffering of Christ on the cross and the immense sacrifice He made for the redemption of humanity. It has been a central part of Easter worship in Andhra and Telangana churches for generations.

lines: సిలువలో నా ప్రభువా నా కొరకై బలియైనావా
ముళ్ళ కిరీటము ధరించి నా కొరకై బాధపడినావా
నీ చేతులకు మేకులు నా పాపముల కొరకై
linesRomanized: Siluvalo naa prabhuvaa naa korakai baliyainava
Mulla kireetamu dharinchi naa korakai baadhapadinava
Nee chethulaku mekulu naa paapamula korakai

lines: నీ సిలువ బలి వలన నాకు రక్షణ
linesRomanized: Nee siluva bali valana naaku rakshana
